creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Pfaller from comment #4)

I did not test changing sorting order, also, I don't have comments on books.

If this is something triggered by content, though, it is not something caused by the porting itself.

I suggest you file a bug with upstream, and link it here, so it can be tracked.

The author is usually quite fast in replying.

You should provide all the usual information (exact version, OS) and some detail about what content is causing the issue.

The author will most probably ask for debug information.
